categories.name: Romance
categories.description: Stories that focus on love and emotional relationships between characters. The main plot usually follows two people developing a romantic connection, often with challenges they must overcome before reaching a happy or hopeful ending.

categories.name: Thriller
categories.description: Fast-paced stories designed to create suspense, tension, and excitement. Thrillers often involve danger, crime, espionage, or psychological conflict where the protagonist must stop a threat or uncover the truth.

categories.name: Sci-fi
categories.description: Stories based on imagined scientific or technological advances. These can include space travel, aliens, time travel, artificial intelligence, or futuristic societies, often exploring how science might shape humanity.

categories.name: Fantasy
categories.description: Stories set in imaginary worlds with magical elements such as wizards, mythical creatures, magical powers, and enchanted lands. The rules of reality are often different from our own world.

categories.name: Historical Fiction
categories.description: Stories set in the past, during real historical periods or events. While the characters or plot may be fictional, the setting, culture, and historical background are based on real history.

categories.name: Self-help
categories.description: Non-fiction books aimed at improving personal well-being or life skills. They provide advice, strategies, and guidance on topics like productivity, mental health, relationships, finances, or personal growth.

categories.name: Adventure
categories.description: Stories that focus on exciting journeys, exploration, and risky quests. Characters often travel to new places, face obstacles, and experience thrilling events while pursuing a goal.

categories.name: Coming-of-Age
categories.description: Stories that focus on a character’s journey from childhood or adolescence into adulthood. The main plot often shows the character learning important life lessons, discovering their identity, and growing emotionally through experiences, challenges, and relationships.

categories.name: Drama
categories.description: Stories that focus on serious emotional conflicts and realistic life situations. The plot usually centers on characters dealing with personal struggles, relationships, or difficult decisions, highlighting deep emotions and character development.

categories.name: Action
categories.description: Fast-paced stories that feature exciting events, physical challenges, and intense conflicts. The plot often includes fights, chases, battles, or competitions where characters must rely on strength, skill, and quick thinking to overcome obstacles or defeat opponents.

categories.name: Sports
categories.description: Stories that focus on athletic activities, competitions, and the experiences of athletes or teams. The main plot usually follows characters as they train, improve their skills, and compete in matches or tournaments while overcoming challenges such as rivalry, pressure, injuries, and teamwork. Sports stories often highlight themes of determination, discipline, perseverance, and personal growth.

categories.name: Comedy
categories.description: A genre focused on humor and amusement, using funny situations, witty dialogue, misunderstandings, and exaggerated characters to entertain readers. Stories usually have a lighthearted tone and often end on a positive or satisfying note.

categories.name: Slice of Life
categories.description: A genre that portrays ordinary, everyday experiences in a realistic and relatable way. The story focuses on daily routines, personal relationships, and small moments of life, often emphasizing character development rather than dramatic events.

products.name: Wind Breaker
products.description:
Wind Breaker is a Korean webtoon about youth, friendship, competition, and street cycling. The story follows Jay Jo, a quiet and highly intelligent student who becomes involved in an underground world of competitive street bike racing. As he joins a cycling crew, he forms friendships, faces rival teams, and discovers freedom and identity outside of academics.

The webtoon mixes intense bike races, personal struggles, and character development, showing how the characters grow through teamwork, rivalry, and challenges in both school and life.

It was created by Yongseok Jo and became popular for its stylish art, dynamic racing scenes, and strong character relationships.
products.author: Yongseok Jo

reviews.name: User
reviews.comment: wowwwww

reviews.name: labilabi
reviews.comment: Great read. The pacing and story were enjoyable. (Wind Breaker)

reviews.name: shelley
reviews.comment: Worth buying. Quality and content met expectations. (Wind Breaker)

products.name: The Little Frog's Guide to Self-Care
products.description: A gentle illustrated book that shares uplifting messages about caring for yourself, believing in your worth, and finding peace in everyday life. Through simple affirmations and adorable frog illustrations, it encourages readers to slow down, practice kindness toward themselves, and build a healthier mindset.
products.author: Maybell Eequay

products.name: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
products.description: A self-improvement book that encourages readers to focus their energy only on what truly matters in life. It challenges the idea of constant positivity and instead promotes accepting struggles, taking responsibility, and choosing meaningful values in order to live a more honest and fulfilling life.
products.author: Mark Manson

reviews.name: maria
reviews.comment: Worth buying. Quality and content met expectations. (The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck)

products.name: The Courage to Be Disliked
products.description: A book presented as a dialogue between a philosopher and a young man that explores ideas about happiness, freedom, and personal change based on the principles of Alfred Adler. It encourages readers to let go of the need for approval from others, take responsibility for their own lives, and build the confidence to live according to their own values.
products.author: Ichiro Kishimi and Fumitake Koga

products.name: One Piece
products.description: A long-running manga about a young pirate named Monkey D. Luffy who gains rubber-like powers after eating a mysterious fruit. He sets sail with his crew, the Straw Hat Pirates, to explore the seas, battle powerful enemies, and search for a legendary treasure that will allow him to become the King of the Pirates.

products.name: Hunger Games
products.description: Set in a dystopian future, the series follows a teenage girl named Katniss Everdeen who volunteers to take her sister’s place in a brutal annual competition where participants fight to the death for the entertainment of the ruling Capitol. As she navigates survival, political intrigue, and rebellion, she becomes a symbol of hope and resistance against an oppressive regime.
products.author: Suzanne Collins

reviews.comment: Best story I've ever read.

products.description: A practical guide that teaches readers how to build small, effective routines that lead to significant improvements over time. It focuses on creating good habits, breaking bad ones, and making tiny changes that compound into meaningful results in personal and professional life.
